name: Dispatch
description:
Unexpected things happen every day.
You can count on SDN to help lift the burdens life throws at us.

Let SDN be your rock, so you, can rock.

You are the newest member of the Z-Team, a former whatever adopted into the Phoenix Program.

No one knows where you came from, other than SDN of course, and no one knows what to expect of you.

You will meet with them today.

Make a good impression.

And good luck on rehabilitation.

Notes:

Highly recommended with a proxy with a lot of memory.

The team includes the Z-Team, with the addition of both Waterboy and Phenomaman, when they show up. Robert's your Dispatcher.

And Beef exists. Pet the dog when you see him.

This will also be updated after we've played the finale just in case there's anything new.

Original Art By: @haru_ch1

Updates:

03/26/2026: Added second scenario where it starts in the conference room instead.
creator: Mewrasaki
